articles.title: 6 TEMPLATES TO BUILD YOUR AI GOVERNANCE FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: 30% of employees are secretly using AI [4], and while it may make them more productive, unsanctioned AI use creates serious data and compliance risks.

articles.title: Download the Enterprise AI Governance Kit from you.com
THE TOTAL IMPACT MATRIX - BEYOND BLIND BETS
articles.summary: The Total Impact Matrix helps teams see how product ideas create value for users and the business. It shows that most ideas deliver little or negative impact, urging teams to balance customer and business needs, measure outcomes, and invest in discovery to improve success.

articles.title: THE ODDS OF MAKING IT
articles.summary: Reaching $1M ARR is possible but slow, while $10M and $25M are rare. Results vary by vintage and category.

articles.title: LESSER APES
articles.summary: As AI eases our cognitive load, we risk losing the very skills that make us human. The antidote is a “feral intellect” nourished by deep reading, real thinking, and deliberate effort.

articles.title: AI CAN CHURN OUT FINANCIAL ADVICE, BUT DOES IT HELP INVESTORS?
articles.summary: AI made Seeking Alpha writers more productive but less insightful. It widened coverage, yet only human-authored articles drove real engagement and market impact.

articles.title: 8 TIPS TO VERIFY CUSTOMERS WITHOUT BREAKING UX
articles.summary: Customer verification will always be at odds with frictionless user journeys - but you can make it smoother by dynamically minimizing the amount of information you request. Learn how to segment users based on a risk spectrum [9] to unlock more effective verification workflows

articles.title: without compromising user experience. Get the guide by Persona
THE MEETING TRAP: HOW WE TURNED COLLABORATION INTO PROCRASTINATION
articles.summary: Use meetings to avoid the hard work of writing, deciding, and thinking. Protect deep work by blocking mornings, working async by default, allowing meetings only for a defined decision with a clear owner, moving routine check-ins to the afternoon, and keeping one meeting-free day every week.

articles.title: HOW TO LEAD THROUGH SYSTEMS, NOT SKILLS
articles.summary: Leadership is not about control but about creating systems that empower others. Great leaders share context, define goals, and trust teams to learn and decide for themselves.

articles.title: PREDICTION: THE SUCCESSOR TO POSTMODERNISM
articles.summary: Prediction defines our new era, shifting society from interpreting the world to forecasting it. In culture, business, and AI, creating value now means contributing information that helps predict what comes next.

articles.title: RENEW YOUR CO-FOUNDER VOWS - AND OTHER TACTICS FOR STRENGTHENING THE MOST IMPORTANT RELATIONSHIP IN YOUR STARTUP
articles.summary: Strong co-founders maintain alignment on vision, grow into changing roles, and protect the relationship with simple rituals. Set vows, seek outside support, use nonviolent communication, meet regularly, and revisit roles so the partnership stays healthy as the company scales.

articles.title: OBSERVE, ASSERT, AND VALIDATE
articles.summary: Don't ask how to help - show it.

articles.title: HOW TO PUT REAL PROGRESS INTO PRACTICE
articles.summary: Real Progress is a dense, practical handbook filled with actionable insights and tools like progress checklists, OKR maps, and evidence matrices to help readers apply its lessons immediately.
